name: Outreach: Park Contact

description.en: Mark an outreach contact as parked, pausing their sequence. Useful when a contact needs a break from automated touches or when manual follow-up is needed.
description.de: Einen Outreach-Kontakt als geparkt markieren und die Sequenz pausieren. Nützlich, wenn ein Kontakt eine Pause von automatisierten Nachrichten braucht oder manuelles Follow-up erforderlich ist.
description.es: Mark an outreach contact as parked, pausing their sequence. Useful when a contact needs a break from automated touches or when manual follow-up is needed.
description.fr: Mark an outreach contact as parked, pausing their sequence. Useful when a contact needs a break from automated touches or when manual follow-up is needed.
description.ro: Mark an outreach contact as parked, pausing their sequence. Useful when a contact needs a break from automated touches or when manual follow-up is needed.
description.it: Mark an outreach contact as parked, pausing their sequence. Useful when a contact needs a break from automated touches or when manual follow-up is needed.

bot: Use this to pause outreach for a contact. Adds the 'outreach-parked' tag and keeps the current sequence/step intact so it can be resumed later.

inputs.name: Contact
inputs.bot: The hashid of the CRM contact to park.
